ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "hasc_code" TEXT /* Hierarchical administrative subdivision code */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtype */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction type */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_subtypes_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_transaction_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction type */,
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subtype */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Value of the transaction */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_transaction_data_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("subtype_id") REFERENCES transaction_subtypes ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_transaction_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_transaction_data_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., price, volume, etc.) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., price, volume, etc.) */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, Midwest)
Unique identifier for each transaction type
Unique identifier for each transaction data entry
Unique identifier for each market trend entry
Type of trend (e.g., price, volume, etc.)
Unique identifier for each forecast entry
Type of forecast (e.g., price, volume, etc.)
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, etc.)
